633 A1400H_PRVT_INSRNC_PYR_SW A1400H_PRVT_INSRNC_PYR_SW A1400H - Payer: Private insurance/Medigap CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is private insurance/Medigap. 0 = No

634 A1400I_PRVT_MC_PYR_SW A1400I_PRVT_MC_PYR_SW A1400I - Payer: Private managed care CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is private managed care. 0 = No
